pageContext.name: Batman and Batmobile
pageContext.description: It's not just a signal; it's a warning. –Batman  Keep an eye out for the Bat-Signal! Focused on the early years of the Caped Crusader's rise of crime-fighting, DC's next blockbuster The Batman will offer the younger version of Batman who swore to take a stand against the forces of evil. To prepare fans for the movie's official release, Sideshow and Hot Toys presents a new series of Cosbaby that recreates your favorite characters as stylish displays! Each Cosbaby stands approximately 9–12.5cm tall with a rotatable head.  The Batman and Batmobile Cosbaby Collectible Set presents the Caped Crusader and the awesome Bat vehicle, the Batmobile, within a single package. Considered as one of the most recognizable iterations of the Dark Knight's ride, the Batmobile is positively massive, measures about 20 cm in length and 12 cm in width. The Batman Cosbaby Collectible Figure comes with a pair of interchangeable arms and is removable from the vehicle to display individually.  Join the fight with The Batman Cosbaby DC collection!
